What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. About this item

  • Disclaimer: Maximum Speed requires overclocking/PC BIOS adjustments. Maximum speed and performance depend on system components, including motherboard and CPU
  • Dynamic RGB Lighting: Individually addressable RGB lighting delivers vibrant effects through a sleek, understated panoramic diffuser
  • Onboard Voltage Regulation: Onboard voltage regulation for reliable power at high frequencies
  • AMD EXPO & Intel XMP Profiles: Dual memory profiles allow you to easily select optimized settings for your platform, whether you’re running an AMD or Intel processor

    From the manufacturer

    • What do I need to run DDR5 memory in my system?

      600-Series (or newer) motherboard* chipset

      Intel - 12th Gen Core Series (or newer) processor

      AMD - Ryzen 7000 Series (or newer) processor

      *When picking components, verify that the selected motherboard supports DDR5.

    • Is DDR5 backwards compatible with DDR4?

      No. DDR5 has a different pin layout than DDR4 and DDR3. This means the DDR4 motherboards will not be compatible with DDR5 RAM.

    • Why is my memory not hittings its rated frequency?

      Typically, you want to check the following: Are the modules inserted in the correct slots of your motherboard? Is XMP/EXPO enabled? Are your BIOS, chipset, and other drivers up to date? Is the memory stated as supported by the chipset on our website?

    • Can I combine multiple kits of CORSAIR DDR5 memory?

      We strongly recommend you do NOT combine multiple kits of CORSAIR DDR5 memory. Our memory kits are only validated for their rated performance when using only the modules provided within that specific kit (box).

    • What is dual-channel RAM?

      The concept behind dual-channel RAM is similar to that of single-channel RAM, but, instead of utilizing a single RAM, the CPU and memory controller can access two memory modules that work simultaneously, resulting in a dual-channel configuration.

    Warranty & Support

    Amazon.com Return Policy:You may return any new computer purchased from Amazon.com that is "dead on arrival," arrives in damaged condition, or is still in unopened boxes, for a full refund within 30 days of purchase. Amazon.com reserves the right to test "dead on arrival" returns and impose a customer fee equal to 15 percent of the product sales price if the customer misrepresents the condition of the product. Any returned computer that is damaged through customer misuse, is missing parts, or is in unsellable condition due to customer tampering will result in the customer being charged a higher restocking fee based on the condition of the product. Amazon.com will not accept returns of any desktop or notebook computer more than 30 days after you receive the shipment. New, used, and refurbished products purchased from Marketplace vendors are subject to the returns policy of the individual vendor.
    Manufacturer’s warranty can be requested from customer service. Click here to make a request to customer service.

    4.7 out of 5 stars

    Product Description

    CORSAIR VENGEANCE RGB RS DDR5 memory delivers DDR5 performance, higher frequencies, and greater capacities optimized for AMD and Intel motherboards while lighting up your PC with dynamic, individually addressable RGB lighting. Tightly screened high-frequency memory chips enable faster processing, rendering, and buffering than ever, with onboard voltage regulation providing reliable power at high frequencies for easy, finely controlled overclocking. Take control with CORSAIR iCUE software and enable RGB lighting customization, and real-time frequency monitoring. A custom PCB provides superb signal quality for high performance and stability on the latest AMD and Intel DDR5 motherboards. For cutting-edge DDR5 performance with mesmerizing RGB lighting, VENGEANCE RGB RS DDR5 lights the way.

    Part Number – CMG16GX5M2E6000Z36
    Latency – 36-44-44-96
    Compatibility – AMD 600 Series, AMD 800 Series, Intel 700 Series, Intel 800 Series Motherboards

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Top reviews from the United States

    • SAYED MOHAMMED JAWAD
      5 out of 5 stars
      Works on Asus TUF X870 + Ryzen R9 9900X
      Reviewed in the United States on May 20, 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Corsair Vengeance RGB RS DDR5 ReviewThe Corsair Vengeance RGB RS DDR5 RAM has been a solid addition to my setup, working flawlessly with the Asus TUF X870-Plus Gaming motherboard and AMD Ryzen R9 9900x processor. Performance-wise, it delivers the speed and stability I expected, making it suitable for gaming and demanding tasks without hiccups.One of the standout features is the vibrant RGB lighting, which adds a visually appealing touch to the build. However, I was disappointed that the RAM's ARGB lighting could not be controlled using Asus Armory Crate software. This limitation meant I couldn't customize the lighting effects as easily as I hoped, which was a bit frustrating given the otherwise smooth integration.Overall, despite the lighting control setback, the Corsair Vengeance RGB RS DDR5 offers excellent performance and reliability. If you prioritize raw performance with stylish RGB and don't mind managing lighting through Corsair's own software, this RAM is a great choice for a high-end gaming rig.

      * you may needs to download ICUE software to control RAM ARGB light.

      It's 10/10 highly recommend 👌

      Read moreRead less

    • C0RR0SIVE
      5 out of 5 stars
      It's RAM... Get it while you still can!
      Reviewed in the United States on May 6, 2026
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      It's RAM... It works... I honestly see zero difference my self between a Third Gen Ryzen system with 16GB of DDR4 3200 and this new system with a 7th Gen Ryzen with this particular kit.

      Yeah, benchmarks are better, but real world performance feels the same. It's a shame in all honest that we are now paying a premium for technological "progress".

      It's 100% not worth current market value what so ever, bide your time on upgrades, stick with what you have unless you absolutely can't.

      Worked great out of the box on an Asrock B650 motherboard, AMD EXPO worked perfectly fine.

      Just wish this particular kit had a white heat spreader as an option.

      Corsair iCUE is a little lacking in overall options for the RGB, and not exactly first-time user intuitive for saving the RGB settings to the individual devices. But the RGB does look nice, especially for those that like things to be a bit on the static side.

      I especially like that these sticks stay relatively cool, HWMonitor reports them sitting around 30C most all the time, even while running benchmarks on a loop.

      Read moreRead less
